rulings.Rulings: MOTION TO TRANSFER VENUE DENIED. ALLEGATIONS OF WRONGFUL CONDUCT IN SAN FRANCISCO SUFFICIENT TO DEFEAT MOTION FOR TRANSFER UNDER VENUE RULES FOR FEHA. ALL CAUSES OF ACTION ARISE FROM SAME UNDERLYING FACTS. (302/AJR/AA)

rulings.Case Title: ALMA JEAN CALDWELL VS. JUL NIEMIER et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER
rulings.Rulings: DEMURRER TO FIFTH CAUSE OF ACTION CONSTRUCTIVE EVICTION SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. NO ALLEGATION THAT PLAINTIFFS VACATED PROPERTY. ALLEGATION THAT BATHROOM LOCKED INSUFFICIENT. DEMURRER TO NINTH CAUSE OF ACTION FRAUD SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. NO ALLEGATIONS OF REPRESENTATION BY PLAINTIFF TO DEFENDANT. (302/AJR/KS(EX))

rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Leave To File Second Amended Complaint Nunc Pro Tunc

CLAIM THAT PROPOSED CAUSES OF ACTION ARE INADEQUATE AS A MATTER OF LAW PREMATURE. (302/AJR/AA)
